title: Great Dallas area pool route
supportTraining: Seller will provide 30 days of training to ensure a smooth transition.
description:
Here’s your chance to own a pool route from the city of Dallas and the surrounding areas! It consists of 35 accounts generating a guaranteed $6,048.00 per month plus MORE from repairs and filter cleans! ***This route is owner-operated*** You will need to provide proof of funds.
